title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Google DeepMind's AlphaFold and AlphaGenome tools enabled Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda to analyze genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team evaluated 15,000 potential protein binding sites and narrowed them to 15 viable targets using computationally efficient approaches that required only a laptop and server.
